description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for building and deploying documentation. The workflow should trigger on a daily and weekly schedule, on push to specific branches and tags, and on pull requests to those branches. It should also allow for a manual dispatch with an option to build expensive documentation. The workflow should run in a container, check out the code, restore a cache, perform variable calculations, build and install a wheel, test the installed version, build the homepage and graphs, and build documentation with Doxygen and Sphinx. Finally, it should upload the documentation to GitHub Pages and create a release artifact.
